prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.5 kg; Height 161.1 cm; BMI 21.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 279mg/dL; 9 months ago 269mg/dL; 6 months ago 231mg/dL; 3 months ago 235mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.9kg; 9 months ago 54.3kg; 6 months ago 54.8kg; 3 months ago 53.7kg; current 54.5kg), Height (12 months ago 161.1cm; 9 months ago 161.1cm; 6 months ago 161.1cm; 3 months ago 161.1cm; current 161.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 124U/L; 9 months ago 130U/L; 6 months ago 130U/L; 3 months ago 121U/L; current 126U/L), AST (12 months ago 75U/L; 9 months ago 74U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 74U/L; current 78U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 83mL/min/1.73m²; current 82mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 56mg/g; 9 months ago 39mg/g; 6 months ago 37mg/g; 3 months ago 50mg/g; current 51mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.8g/dL; 9 months ago 14.3g/dL; 6 months ago 13.7g/dL; 3 months ago 14.3g/dL; current 14.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.74 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
